title: helianthemum marifolium var. italicum
intro: Helianthemum marifolium var. italicum, also known as Rockrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Rockrose include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
